description: Product Description Head Funk Colour Revive Conditioner 600ml Ingredients Head Funk Colour Revive Conditioner 600ml Directions After shampooing, apply Head Funk Colour Revive Conditioner evenly through hair. Leave on for 2-3 minutes, then rinse thoroughly. For best results, use 600ml per application. Suitable for all hair types, especially colored hair.
